calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

DEFENDANT DELIA CARBAJAL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/EH)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Asdie Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Delia Carbajal, 415-584-3087, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona.
Carlos Carbajal, acting as an interpreter for Delia Carbajal

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT DELIA CARBAJAL'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS PROPER. NO RESPONSIVE PLEADING WAS INCLUDED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558 (301/JLW)
